title: ForgeMeter: Datadog for Your AI Development Stack
excerpt: Enterprises instrument production with Datadog—but AI dev tools run blind. ForgeMeter is the observability layer engineering finance has been missing.
bodyHtml:
Datadog tells you when API latency spikes. It doesn't tell you that your backend team routed every code review through the most expensive Claude model last week. AI-assisted development needs its own observability category.

Parallels that help buyers decide

  • Connect in minutes via official APIs—like installing a Datadog integration
  • Unified dashboard instead of five vendor consoles
  • Alerts on anomalies before they become invoices
  • AI summaries that translate metrics for non-engineering stakeholders

What stays different

ForgeMeter does not store source code or intercept IDE traffic. It consumes billing and usage metadata—the minimum needed for cost and adoption signals—keeping security reviews lightweight.

Who it's for

CTOs and VPs at 10–200 engineer orgs running multiple AI tools; platform teams tasked with FinOps for developer experience; and design partners shaping enterprise governance features.

Explore the demo

Visit forgemeter.com for a live demo showing monthly spend, token volume, active developers, and AI-generated savings recommendations—no credit card required.
